name: Westheimer Pawn
description_short: FirstCash is the leading international operator of pawn stores with 3,300+ locations across 29 U.S. states, the UK, and Latin America, offering pawn loans, retail sales, and gold buying services.
description_long:
FirstCash, Inc. is headquartered in Fort Worth, Texas and operates as the leading international pawn store operator with over 3,300 retail locations spanning 29 U.S. states, Washington D.C., the United Kingdom, and Latin America (Mexico, Guatemala, Colombia, and El Salvador). The company employs approximately 22,000 people and is listed in both the S&P MidCap 400 Index and Russell 2000 Index, indicating its scale and legitimacy as a public company.

FirstCash serves cash and credit-constrained consumers primarily through non-recourse pawn loans secured by pledged personal property. They buy and sell a wide variety of merchandise including jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments. The company also offers layaway services (10% down payment plans), gold/precious metal buying, and retail sales of secondhand goods. Additionally, FirstCash operates AFF, a subsidiary providing lease-to-own and retail finance payment solutions through over 15,000 merchant partner locations nationwide.

The company's scale and public market status distinguish it from independent pawn shops. FirstCash maintains standardized operations across thousands of locations, offers multiple service channels (in-person, online locator tools, and mobile services), and provides transparent service information including pawn FAQs and how-to guides. Their size allows for consistent customer experience and operational standards across disparate geographic markets.

FirstCash represents a mainstream, established option in the pawn industry but carries the inherent limitations of pawn lending: non-recourse loans mean defaulted items are forfeited with no further obligation, interest rates and fees are not disclosed on their website, and the business model depends on asset depreciation and resale margins. Consumers should understand pawn loans as short-term financing secured by personal possessions, not unsecured credit.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: 3,300+ retail locations across 29 U.S. states, DC, UK, and Latin America for accessibility
Public company (S&P MidCap 400, Russell 2000) providing corporate transparency and investor oversight
Non-recourse loans mean borrowers have no personal liability beyond the pledged item
Buys and sells wide variety of merchandise (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, instruments)
Layaway service available with 10% down payment option for planned purchases
Dedicated gold and precious metal buying service for immediate cash conversion
Employs 22,000+ people, indicating operational stability and established infrastructure
cons: Interest rates, fees, and loan terms not disclosed on website—consumers must visit stores for pricing
Non-recourse structure means pledged items are forfeited without debt obligation, incentivizing forfeiture over repayment
Pawn loans provide only short-term financing (typically 30-90 days) unsuitable for long-term financial needs
Merchandise quality and selection varies significantly across 3,300 locations with no quality guarantees
No mention of credit reporting to bureaus, so pawn loans do not build credit history
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash who own valuable collateral (jewelry, electronics, instruments)
Individuals seeking short-term loans without credit checks or income verification requirements
People interested in buying secondhand merchandise at discounted prices
Cash-constrained consumers seeking layaway options to purchase items with partial upfront payment
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for cash-constrained consumers with valuable collateral who need immediate short-term financing without credit checks. The primary caveat is that pawn loans are not credit-building products, terms and interest rates vary by location, and borrowers should understand they are trading temporary liquidity for their personal possessions with no recourse if unable to repay.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal property (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, instruments)
Gold, silver, and platinum buying and selling services
Layaway service with 10% down payment option
Store locator tool to find nearby locations
Lease-to-own and retail finance solutions through AFF subsidiary (15,000+ merchant partners)
Cash on-the-spot payment for items purchased
What We Buy/What We Sell categorized merchandise guides
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
